title: try_set_nickname TOCTOU: SELECT+UPDATE outside single transaction
description: Two concurrent SET_NICKNAME requests for the same pub_id can both pass the 'existing.is_none()' check at store.rs:545 before either runs the UPDATE at store.rs:550. Result: both reach the UPDATE; the UNIQUE constraint only fires if they picked different nicknames — same-nickname races produce two 'Set' responses even though only one row was changed. Fix: wrap the SELECT + UPDATE in a single BEGIN IMMEDIATE transaction.
